rules.name: no_inline_styles
rules.description: Inline style objects are expensive to re-create — use StyleSheet.create
rules.message: Inline style object in React Native component. Use StyleSheet.create() for better performance.
rules.fix_suggestion: const styles = StyleSheet.create({ container: { ... } }); then style={styles.container}.

rules.name: no_asyncstorage_for_secrets
rules.description: AsyncStorage is unencrypted — never store tokens or secrets in it
rules.message: Sensitive data stored in AsyncStorage (unencrypted). Use react-native-keychain or expo-secure-store.
rules.fix_suggestion: import Keychain from 'react-native-keychain'; await Keychain.setGenericPassword(user, token);

rules.name: use_flatlist_for_lists
rules.description: Use FlatList/SectionList for lists instead of .map() to enable virtualisation
rules.message: Array.map() used to render list items. Use FlatList or SectionList for large/dynamic lists.
rules.fix_suggestion: <FlatList data={items} renderItem={({ item }) => <ItemComponent item={item} />} keyExtractor={(item) => item.id} />

rules.name: use_safe_area_view
rules.description: Screens should use SafeAreaView to handle iOS notch/home indicator
rules.message: Screen returns a plain <View>. Use SafeAreaView to handle iOS safe areas.
rules.fix_suggestion: import { SafeAreaView } from 'react-native-safe-area-context'; wrap the root view.

rules.name: platform_specific_styles
rules.description: Use Platform.OS for platform-specific style values
rules.message: Hard-coded platform-specific padding found. Use Platform.OS to handle iOS/Android differences.

rules.name: no_class_components_rn
rules.description: Class components are discouraged — use functional components with hooks
rules.message: Class component detected in React Native. Use functional components with hooks.
rules.fix_suggestion: Convert to a functional component with useState/useEffect/useRef hooks.

rules.name: lazy_load_heavy_modules
rules.description: Heavy native modules should be conditionally imported
rules.message: Heavy native module imported at top level. Consider conditional/lazy loading where possible.
rules.fix_suggestion: Load conditionally: if (featureEnabled) { const VideoPlayer = require('react-native-video').default; }
